Digital Resources

BJJ references for adults who train seriously

Written by a 3rd-Degree Black Belt. For adults who train BJJ seriously — not competitively. No tournament prep, no sport-specific tactics. Just the fundamentals that actually transfer, regardless of where you train.

01 — Student Manual
The Art of Yielding Well
Positions, terminology, mat etiquette, and what to expect in your first months of training. Concise and honest — the guide most gyms should give you but don't.
Available soon
02 — Framework
The 5 Pillars Framework
A structured framework for understanding how your BJJ game is built — and where to focus next. Built around how adults actually learn, not how competitors train.
Available soon
Bundle
Manual + Framework Bundle
Both resources together. The Manual covers the ground — what BJJ looks like from the outside. The Framework covers the structure — how to build a game that lasts.
Available soon
Browse all products Secure checkout via Lemon Squeezy. Instant digital delivery.
Available soon
Training Gear

What to bring

Recommended gear for new students — sourced from Shopee for convenience. You don't need all of this on day one.

Affiliate links — disclosed. Clicking may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

Adidas JJ350 2.0 BJJ Gi
For Thursday Gi classes. Solid entry-level gi — durable construction, proper lapel weight. Available in A2 and A3. If unsure of sizing, ask Coach Vince before ordering.
View on Shopee →
Adidas adiCSR02 Rash Guard
For Monday NoGi classes. Half-sleeve compression fit, moisture-wicking. Worn under a gi or on its own for NoGi. Pairs with the fight shorts below.
View on Shopee →
Fighter Destination Basic II Fight Shorts
Lightweight, 4-way stretch, quick-dry. Works for both NoGi and general training. Simple and functional — no need to spend more on your first pair.
View on Shopee →
Venum Mouthguard
Not required for your first session, but get one before you start live rolling. Boil-and-bite fit, dual-layer protection. Comes with a storage case.
View on Shopee →
